description: Safety and quality enforcement system for preventing errors and enforcing best practices

evals.prompt: How do I use guard rails to prevent XSS attacks in deal submissions?
evals.expected_output: XSS prevention patterns using guard rails for input validation

evals.prompt: What resource limits are enforced by guard rails and how do I configure them?
evals.expected_output: Resource limit configuration for deals, payload size, and field lengths
assertions: Shows fatal error on limit exceeded

evals.prompt: How do I validate data quality before publishing deals?
evals.expected_output: Quality validation using guard rails for required fields and URL validity

evals.prompt: How can I use guard rails to ensure data consistency through the pipeline?
evals.expected_output: Consistency checks for deal counts, data loss, and hash integrity
assertions: Shows warning vs fatal consistency errors

evals.prompt: How do guard rails enforce file organization policies?
evals.expected_output: File organization enforcement for root directory policy
assertions: Lists allowed root files (.gitignore, package.json, etc.)
